chunks.text: # How Ari Works — The Chatbot Itself Ari is a RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) chatbot built on: - Cloudflare Workers (serverless, free tier — 100k requests/day) - Google Gemini API (gemini-2.0-flash for chat, text-embedding-004 for vectors) - Pre-computed knowledge base with cosine similarity search Flow: 1. User asks a question → embedded into a vector via Gemini 2. Vector compared against stored knowledge chunks (cosine similarity) 3. Top matching chunks retrieved as context 4. Prompt built: system personality + retrieved context + user question 5. Gemini generates a grounded, factual answer Architecture: Static HTML widget on portfolio → calls Cloudflare Worker → Gemini API. No backend server to manage. Entire backend is a single JS file.

# Bio — Who is Prashant Singh Prashant Singh is an MBA candidate at BITS Pilani (Business Analytics) with a B.Sc.(Hons) in Physics from Banaras Hindu University (BHU). His arc is: Physics → Data → Strategy. He designs data architectures and analytics products that turn raw information into strategic decisions. He describes himself as a product thinker who builds at the intersection of data and decisions — comfortable defining system schemas, directing builds, and drawing business implications from complex data.

# Capabilities — What Prashant Brings Product & Strategy: - Structural schema design and system architecture planning - Product strategy and competitive intelligence - Defining technical requirements and directing implementation - Bridging business questions with data infrastructure Data & Analytics: - Data architecture and ETL pipeline design - Dashboard design (Recharts, ECharts, Tableau) - KPI architecture and unit economics - Cohort and funnel analysis Technical: - Python, SQL, Postgres, Next.js, TypeScript - Machine learning (XGBoost, Random Forest, scikit-learn) - NLP (BERTopic, LDA, scispaCy, NER) - Serverless, Cloudflare Workers, Supabase, Vercel

# Experience — Where Prashant Has Been May 2026 — Present: Data Science Intern at a Health Tech Company - Designing data architecture and analytics dashboards - Drawing business implications from complex healthcare data - Raw messy data to actionable strategic output 2025 — Present: MBA — Business Analytics at BITS Pilani - Quantitative strategy, marketing analytics, corporate finance - Applying technical work as consulting-grade business intelligence 2020 — 2023: B.Sc.(Hons) Physics at Banaras Hindu University (BHU) - First-principles reasoning and mathematical modeling - The foundation for everything that came after

# Projects — What Prashant Has Built OCIE — Guideline ↔ Pipeline Mapper (Next.js, Postgres, NLP) - NSCLC drug-to-guideline mapping by biomarker and line of therapy - Dashboard with NLP-tagged evidence from guideline text Onco-Directory (Next.js, Supabase, Clerk, TypeScript) - Verified professional network for oncology - Trust tied to medical license IDs — no spam - Graph-based connection engine by specialisation - Direct messaging for referrals and consultations OncoAssist — Clinical Analytics Dashboard (Next.js, Recharts, Supabase) - Competitive intelligence platform for pharma strategy teams - Maps drug trial trajectories — completed, active, new initiations - Surfaces cancer targets and trial structure AI Hiring Signals Pipeline (Python, BERTopic, Granger Causality) - Job posting tracking across frontier AI labs - BERTopic + Granger causality to predict product announcements Political Discourse Topic Modeling (LDA, scikit-learn, Python) - LDA-based pipeline analyzing political speeches - Interactive dashboard with word clouds and topic weights
